title: Tyk Gateway - API Portfolio Overview
description: Daily API health: RED metrics, error analysis, SLO tracking, multi-tenancy, and consumer identity. Audience: API platform team leads, SRE on-call.

options.content:
## 🗺 How to use this dashboard

**Target audience**: On-call SRE, API Platform Team Leads  
**Use when**: Daily health check, on-call triage, SLO review

| Symptom | What to look at | Next step |
|---------|----------------|-----------|
| 🔴 Error rate elevated | Error Analysis row (top of page) | Click the API name → Troubleshoot |
| 🟠 Error budget <20% remaining | SLO / Error Budget row | Incident likely in progress — escalate |
| 🔴 Latency regression | "Top 10 APIs by P95 Latency" | Click the API name → Troubleshoot |
| 🟠 One tenant impacted | Multi-Tenancy row | Filter by `tenant_id` variable |
| 🔴 Gateway infra issue | Everything looks red | Check → [Fleet Health](/grafana/d/tyk-gateway-fleet-health) first |

panels.title: ℹ️ How to use this dashboard
5xx Error Rate
panels.description: Server errors as % of total. Green <1%, Amber 1-5%, Red >5%.

targets.expr: sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100 or vector(0)

panels.title: 4xx Error Rate
panels.description: Client errors as % of total. Green <5%, Amber 5-15%, Red >15%.

targets.expr: sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"4..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100 or vector(0)

panels.title: P95 Total Latency
panels.description: End-to-end P95 latency seen by clients. Green <500ms, Amber 500-1000ms, Red >1s.

panels.title: P95 Gateway Latency
panels.description: Tyk's own processing overhead at P95. High value indicates policy execution or plugin issues.

panels.title: P95 Upstream Latency
panels.description: Backend service P95 latency. High value = backend is slow, not Tyk.

panels.title: Latency Trend: Total vs Gateway vs Upstream (P95)
panels.description: The hero panel. If gateway latency is flat and upstream spikes, the backend is the culprit — 5-second diagnosis.

targets.expr:
(
  sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))
  / sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))
  * 100
)
* on(tyk_api_id) group_left(api_name)
  (0 * label_replace(
    max by(api_id, api_name)(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name"}),
    "tyk_api_id", "$1", "api_id", "(.*)"
  ) + 1)

topk(10,
  (
    sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))
    / sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))
    * 100
  )
  * on(tyk_api_id) group_left(api_name)
    (0 * label_replace(
      max by(api_id, api_name)(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name"}),
      "tyk_api_id", "$1", "api_id", "(.*)"
    ) + 1)
)

panels.title: Response Flag Distribution
panels.description: URS = upstream 5xx, BD = bad destination, RL = rate limited, AUTH = auth failure. Fastest path to error cause.

panels.title: 429 Rate Over Time
panels.description: Rate limiting pressure — leading indicator of customer impact.

targets.expr:
topk(10,
  histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, tyk_api_id)(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))) * 1000
  * on(tyk_api_id) group_left(api_name)
    label_replace(
      max by(api_id, api_name)(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name"}),
      "tyk_api_id", "$1", "api_id", "(.*)"
    )
)

topk(10,
  (
    sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))
    / sum by(tyk_api_id)(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", http_request_method=~"$method"}[$__rate_interval]))
    * 100
  )
  * on(tyk_api_id) group_left(api_name)
    (0 * label_replace(
      max by(api_id, api_name)(tyk_requests_by_path_total{service_name=~"$service_name"}),
      "tyk_api_id", "$1", "api_id", "(.*)"
    ) + 1)
)

panels.title: Latency by API (P50 / P95 / P99) — Total, Gateway, Upstream
panels.description: Full percentile breakdown. Starting point for investigation into a slow or error-prone API.

targets.expr: sum by(tenant_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_tenant_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", response_code=~"5..", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(tenant_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_tenant_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Tenant SLO Table
panels.description: Per-tenant: request rate, error %, P50 latency, P95 latency. Mini SLO view at a glance.

targets.expr: sum by(tenant_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_tenant_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", response_code=~"5..", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by(tenant_id)(rate(tyk_requests_by_tenant_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100

panels.title: Subscription Tier Traffic
panels.description: Free vs Pro vs Enterprise traffic split.

targets.expr: sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id", le="1"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(http_server_request_duration_seconds_count{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100 or vector(100)

panels.title: Error Budget Remaining
panels.description: 30-day rolling error budget. Budget consumed = actual error rate / allowed error rate (0.1% for 99.9% SLO). Turns red when budget is burning fast.

targets.expr: (1 - (sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[30d])) / sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[30d]))) / (1 - $slo_availability_target/100)) * 100 or vector(100)

panels.title: SLO Burn Rate (1h and 6h windows)
panels.description: >14.4× on 1h window = burns 100% of monthly budget in 1h = critical page.

targets.expr: sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[1h])) / sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[1h])) / (1 - $slo_availability_target/100) or vector(0)

sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", http_response_status_code=~"5..", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[6h])) / sum(rate(tyk_api_requests_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", tyk_api_id=~"$api_id"}[6h])) / (1 - $slo_availability_target/100) or vector(0)

sum(rate(tyk_requests_with_cache_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", cache_status="1", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum(rate(tyk_requests_with_cache_total{service_name=~"$service_name", tyk_gw_id=~"$tyk_gw_id", api_id=~"$api_id"}[$__rate_interval])) * 100 or vector(0)

panels.title: Cache Status Over Time
panels.description: Drop in cache hits often precedes latency spikes.

panels.title: Backend Version Distribution
panels.description: Canary and blue-green rollout visibility — correlate latency with version changes.

options.content:
[Error classification docs →](https://tyk.io/docs/api-management/logs#error-classification)

**Upstream and Proxy Errors**

| Flag | Name | HTTP | Description |
|------|------|------|-------------|
| `TLE` | TLS Certificate Expired | 502 | Upstream TLS certificate has expired |
| `TLI` | TLS Certificate Invalid | 502 | Upstream TLS certificate failed validation |
| `TLM` | TLS Hostname Mismatch | 502 | Certificate CN/SAN does not match hostname |
| `TLN` | TLS Not Trusted | 502 | Certificate issued by unknown authority |
| `TLH` | TLS Handshake Failure | 502 | TLS handshake failed |
| `TLP` | TLS Protocol Error | 502 | TLS protocol or version mismatch |
| `TLA` | TLS Alert | 502 | TLS alert received from upstream |
| `UCF` | Connection Refused | 502 | Upstream refused the TCP connection |
| `UCT` | Connection Timeout | 502 | TCP connection to upstream timed out |
| `URR` | Connection Reset | 502 | Connection reset by upstream server |
| `EPI` | Broken Pipe | 502 | Connection closed unexpectedly (EPIPE) |
| `URT` | Response Timeout | 504 | Upstream did not respond in time |
| `DNS` | DNS Resolution Failure | 502 | Upstream hostname could not be resolved |
| `NRH` | No Route to Host | 502 | Upstream host or network unreachable |
| `NHU` | No Healthy Upstreams | 503 | All targets in load balancer are unhealthy |
| `CBO` | Circuit Breaker Open | 503 | Circuit breaker is open |
| `URS` | Upstream Response 5XX | 5XX | Upstream returned a 5XX status code |
| `UPE` | Upstream Error | 5XX | Generic upstream error |

**Authentication Errors**

| Flag | Name | HTTP | Description |
|------|------|------|-------------|
| `AMF` | Auth Field Missing | 400/401 | Authorization header or parameter missing |
| `AKI` | API Key Invalid | 403 | API key not found or invalid |
| `TKE` | Token Expired | 403 | JWT, OAuth token, or client cert has expired |
| `TKI` | Token Invalid | 403 | JWT or OAuth token malformed or bad signature |
| `TCV` | Token Claims Invalid | 401 | JWT claims validation failed |
| `EAD` | External Auth Denied | 403 | External auth service denied the request |

**Rate Limiting**

| Flag | Name | HTTP | Description |
|------|------|------|-------------|
| `RLT` | Rate Limited | 429 | Request rejected due to rate limit |
| `QEX` | Quota Exceeded | 403 | Client usage quota exhausted |

**Request Validation**

| Flag | Name | HTTP | Description |
|------|------|------|-------------|
| `BTL` | Body Too Large | 400 | Request body exceeds configured size limit |
| `CLM` | Content-Length Missing | 411 | Required Content-Length header missing |
| `BIV` | Body Invalid | 400/422 | Request body malformed or fails schema validation |
| `IHD` | Invalid Header | 400 | Required request header malformed or invalid |

**Client Connection**

| Flag | Name | HTTP | Description |
|------|------|------|-------------|
| `CDC` | Client Disconnected | 499 | Client closed connection before response sent |

panels.title: Error Flag Distribution (4xx+5xx)
panels.description: Flag distribution for error responses only (4xx+5xx). Uses http.server.request.duration histogram count. Complements the general flag chart above which covers all traffic.
